sql.if: SELECT PRIME.* FROM ( SELECT SUBQRY.* , COUNT(1) OVER() AS XTRM_DATA_TOT_COUNT FROM (

mapper.select:
/* [selectUserMenuData] 매뉴 dialog 오픈시 매뉴 리스트 정보 검색 */ WITH RECURSIVE CTE_AUTH_MENU(MAIN_MENU_KEY, USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY, MENU_KEY, UPPER_MENU_KEY) AS ( SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN AA.PRIOR_RANK = 1 THEN AA.MAIN_MENU_KEY ELSE NULL END) OVER() AS MAIN_MENU_KEY , MAX(CASE WHEN AA.PRIOR_RANK = 1 THEN AA.USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY ELSE NULL END) OVER() AS USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY , BB.MENU_KEY , BB.UPPER_MENU_KEY FROM ( SELECT A.COMPANY_CODE , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY B.PRIOR_RANK) AS PRIOR_RANK , D.MENU_KEY , MAX(B.MAIN_MENU_KEY) AS MAIN_MENU_KEY , MAX(A.MAIN_MENU_KEY) AS USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY FROM COM_USER A INNER JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP B ON A.COMPANY_CODE = B.COMPANY_CODE INNER JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP_USER C ON A.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND B.GROUP_KEY = C.GROUP_KEY INNER JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP_MENU D ON A.COMPANY_CODE = D.COMPANY_CODE AND B.GROUP_KEY = D.GROUP_KEY WHERE A.COMPANY_CODE = #{sessionCompanyCode} AND A.USER_ID = #{selectUserId} GROUP BY A.COMPANY_CODE, B.PRIOR_RANK, D.MENU_KEY ) AA INNER JOIN COM_MENU BB ON AA.COMPANY_CODE = BB.COMPANY_CODE AND AA.MENU_KEY = BB.MENU_KEY
AND (BB.MENU_KEY LIKE '%' || #{menuInfo} || '%' OR BB.MENU_NAME LIKE '%' || #{menuInfo} || '%')
UNION ALL SELECT NULL , NULL , A.MENU_KEY , A.UPPER_MENU_KEY FROM COM_MENU A INNER JOIN CTE_AUTH_MENU B ON A.MENU_KEY = B.UPPER_MENU_KEY WHERE A.COMPANY_CODE = #{sessionCompanyCode} )
SELECT AA.MENU_KEY AS NODE_ID , AA.UPPER_MENU_KEY AS PARENT_NODE_ID , AA.MENU_NAME AS NODE_TITLE , AA.FULL_MENU_NAME AS TOOL_TIP , CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN AA.USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY IS NULL THEN AA.MAIN_MENU_KEY ELSE AA.USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY END) = AA.MENU_KEY THEN 'mainMenuNode' ELSE NULL END AS CLASSES , AA.MENU_KEY , AA.FULL_MENU_KEY , AA.MENU_NAME , AA.FULL_MENU_NAME , AA.NODE_LEVEL , AA.UPPER_MENU_KEY , AA.MENU_DESC , AA.PROGRAM_PARAM_CONTENTS , AA.VIEW_TARGET_CODE , AA.MENU_PATH_INFO , AA.POPUP_WIDTH_SIZE , AA.POPUP_VERTICAL_SIZE , AA.ICON_CLASS_NAME , AA.HAS_CHILD_AT , AA.USE_AT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.MENU_KEY , A.FULL_MENU_KEY , A.MENU_NAME , A.FULL_MENU_NAME , A.NODE_LEVEL , A.UPPER_MENU_KEY , A.MENU_DESC , A.PROGRAM_PARAM_CONTENTS , A.VIEW_TARGET_CODE , A.MENU_PATH_INFO , A.POPUP_WIDTH_SIZE , A.POPUP_VERTICAL_SIZE , A.ICON_CLASS_NAME , A.CUSTOM_SORTING_SN , A.USE_AT , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(MENU_KEY) FROM COM_MENU WHERE UPPER_MENU_KEY = A.MENU_KEY) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_CHILD_AT , MAX(B.MAIN_MENU_KEY) OVER() AS MAIN_MENU_KEY , MAX(B.USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY) OVER() AS USER_MAIN_MENU_KEY FROM VIEW_MENU_INFO A INNER JOIN CTE_AUTH_MENU B ON A.MENU_KEY = B.MENU_KEY WHERE A.COMPANY_CODE = #{sessionCompanyCode} AND A.LANGUAGE_CODE = #{sessionLanguageCode} AND A.FULL_USE_AT NOT LIKE '%N%' -- TODO: 사용 여부 TREE 중 N이 포함된 케이스에 대응하기 위한 인덱스 추가 ) AA ORDER BY CUSTOM_SORTING_SN

/* [selectUserPasswordHist] 로그인 화면 비밀번호 변경 시 비밀번호 변경 이력 조회 */ SELECT COMPANY_CODE , USER_ID , HISTORY_KEY , PASSWORD_ENCPT , ENCPT_KEY_INFO , CHANGE_DT , FIRST_CREATE_USER_ID , CREATE_DT , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHANGE_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS TODAY_CHANGE_AT FROM COM_USER_PASSWORD_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND FIRST_CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CHANGE_DT DESC

/* [selectUserBase] 사용자 기본 정보 검색 */ SELECT A.COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE -- COMPANY_CODE , (SELECT COMPANY_NAME FROM COM_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = A.COMPANY_CODE) AS COMPANY_NAME -- COMPANY_NAME , (SELECT ENCPT_KEY_INFO FROM COM_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = A.COMPANY_CODE) AS ENCPT_KEY_INFO -- ENCPT_KEY_INFO , A.USER_ID AS USER_ID -- 사용자 ID , CASE WHEN C.USER_NAME IS NULL THEN B.USER_NAME ELSE C.USER_NAME END AS USER_NAME -- 사용자명 , A.PASSWORD_ENCPT AS PASSWORD_ENCPT -- 암호화된 패스워드 , A.MOBILE_PHONE_KEY AS MOBILE_PHONE_KEY -- 모바일단방향암호화 , A.MOBILE_PHONE_MASK AS MOBILE_PHONE_MASK -- 모바일번호(마스킹) , A.MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT AS MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT -- 모바일번호(암호화)
, CASE WHEN A.MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT IS NOT NULL AND A.MOBILE_PHONE_MASK IS NOT NULL THEN DEC_AES(A.MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT, #{userIdKey}) ELSE '' END AS MOBILE_PHONE
, A.CABLETELEPHONE_KEY AS CABLETELEPHONE_KEY , A.CABLETELEPHONE_MASK AS CABLETELEPHONE_MASK , A.CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT AS CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT
, CASE WHEN A.CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT IS NOT NULL AND A.CABLETELEPHONE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN DEC_AES(A.CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT, #{userIdKey}) ELSE '' END AS CABLETELEPHONE
, A.EMAIL_KEY AS EMAIL_KEY , A.EMAIL_MASK AS EMAIL_MASK , A.EMAIL_ENCPT AS EMAIL_ENCPT
, CASE WHEN A.EMAIL_ENCPT IS NOT NULL AND A.EMAIL_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN DEC_AES(A.EMAIL_ENCPT, #{userIdKey}) ELSE '' END AS EMAIL
, A.ACCOUNT_USE_AT AS ACCOUNT_USE_AT , A.LOCAL_EXTENTION_NUMBER AS LOCAL_EXTENTION_NUMBER , A.RSPOFC_CODE AS RSPOFC_CODE , A.ETC_01_INFO AS ETC_01_INFO , A.ETC_02_INFO AS ETC_02_INFO , A.ETC_03_INFO AS ETC_03_INFO , A.ETC_04_INFO AS ETC_04_INFO , A.ETC_05_INFO AS ETC_05_INFO , A.CTI_ID AS CTI_ID , A.VPN_ID AS VPN_ID , A.VO_IP AS VO_IP , A.PC_IP AS PC_IP , A.VPN_IP AS VPN_IP , A.RECENT_CONNECT_IP AS RECENT_CONNECT_IP , A.RECENT_CONNECT_SESSION_ID_INFO AS RECENT_CONNECT_SESSION_ID_INFO , CASE WHEN A.PASSWORD_ERROR_COUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE A.PASSWORD_ERROR_COUNT END AS PASSWORD_ERROR_COUNT , A.LOGIN_AT AS LOGIN_AT , (SELECT MAX(CHANGE_DT) FROM COM_USER_PASSWORD_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = A.COMPANY_CODE AND USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS RECENT_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , A.RECENT_LOGIN_DT AS RECENT_LOGIN_DT , CASE WHEN A.RECENT_LOGIN_DT IS NOT NULL THEN ( CASE WHEN (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - CAST(A.RECENT_LOGIN_DT AS DATE)) > INTERVAL '180 days' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE 'N' END AS IS_LOCK_ACCOUNT --180일 안에 로그인 시도여부로 판단한 계정 잠김상태 여부 , (SELECT SAP_CORP_CODE FROM VOB_CORP WHERE CORP_CODE = B.CORP_CODE AND COMPANY_CODE = B.COMPANY_CODE) AS CORP_CODE -- CORP_CODE , CASE WHEN C.CORP_NAME IS NULL THEN B.CORP_NAME ELSE C.CORP_NAME END AS CORP_NAME -- 법인 명 , B.DEPT_CODE AS DEPT_CODE -- 부서 코드 , D.FULL_DEPT_CODE AS FULL_DEPT_CODE -- 전체부서코드 , D.DEPT_NAME AS DEPT_NAME -- 부서명 , D.FULL_DEPT_NAME AS FULL_DEPT_NAME -- 전체부서명 , B.CORP_SECTION_CODE AS CORP_SECTION_CODE -- 법인 구분 코드 , B.DEPT_SPECIAL_CODE AS DEPT_SPECIAL_CODE -- 부서 특수 코드 , B.JOB_GRADE_CODE AS JOB_GRADE_CODE -- 직급 코드 , CASE WHEN C.JOB_GRADE_NAME IS NULL THEN B.JOB_GRADE_NAME ELSE C.JOB_GRADE_NAME END AS JOB_GRADE_NAME -- 직급 명 , B.POSITION_CODE AS POSITION_CODE -- 직책 코드 , CASE WHEN C.POSITION_NAME IS NULL THEN B.POSITION_NAME ELSE C.POSITION_NAME END AS POSITION_NAME -- 직책 명 , B.OFFICIAL_POSITION_CODE AS OFFICIAL_POSITION_CODE -- 직위 코드 , CASE WHEN C.OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME IS NULL THEN B.OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME ELSE C.OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME END AS OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME -- 직위 명 , B.PG_CODE AS PG_CODE -- PG CODE , CASE WHEN C.PG_NAME IS NULL THEN B.PG_NAME ELSE C.PG_NAME END AS PG_NAME -- PG 명 , B.PU_CODE AS PU_CODE -- PU CODE , CASE WHEN C.PU_NAME IS NULL THEN B.PU_NAME ELSE C.PU_NAME END AS PU_NAME -- PU 명 , B.BUSINESS_PLACE_CODE AS BUSINESS_PLACE_CODE -- 사업장 코드 , CASE WHEN C.BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME IS NULL THEN B.BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME ELSE C.BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME END AS BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME -- 사업장 명 , B.ZIP_CODE AS ZIP_CODE -- 우편 번호 , B.EMP_STATUS_CODE AS EMP_STATUS_CODE -- 재직 코드 , B.SEX_CODE AS SEX_CODE -- 성별 코드 , B.JOB_GRADE_SECTION_CODE AS JOB_GRADE_SECTION_CODE -- 직급 구분 코드 , B.ACCOUNT_USE_AT AS EXT_ACCOUNT_USE_AT -- 확장 계정 사용 여부 , B.COOP_COMPANY_AT AS COOP_COMPANY_AT -- 협력업체여부 , B.COOP_COMPANY_CORP_CODE AS COOP_COMPANY_CORP_CODE -- 협력업체 법인 코드 , B.NATIONALTY_CODE AS NATIONALTY_CODE -- 국적 코드 , B.NATIONALTY_NAME AS NATIONALTY_NAME -- 국적 명 , CASE WHEN C.ADDRESS_ADD_INFO IS NULL THEN B.ADDRESS_ADD_INFO ELSE C.ADDRESS_ADD_INFO END AS ADDRESS_ADD_INFO -- 주소추가정보 , CASE WHEN C.ADDRESS_INFO IS NULL THEN B.ADDRESS_INFO ELSE C.ADDRESS_INFO END AS ADDRESS_INFO -- 주소정보 FROM COM_USER A LEFT OUTER JOIN VOB_USER_EXT B ON A.COMPANY_CODE = B.COMPANY_CODE AND A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN VOB_USER_EXT_LANG C ON B.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE AND B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.LANGUAGE_CODE = LOWER(#{languageCode}) LEFT OUTER JOIN VIEW_VOB_DEPT_INFO D ON B.COMPANY_CODE = D.COMPANY_CODE AND B.DEPT_CODE = D.DEPT_CODE AND D.LANGUAGE_CODE = LOWER(#{languageCode}) WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* [selectUserForLogin] 로그인을 위한 사용자 정보 검색 */ SELECT A.COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE -- COMPANY_CODE , (SELECT COMPANY_NAME FROM COM_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = A.COMPANY_CODE) AS COMPANY_NAME -- COMPANY_NAME , (SELECT ENCPT_KEY_INFO FROM COM_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = A.COMPANY_CODE) AS ENCPT_KEY_INFO -- ENCPT_KEY_INFO , A.USER_ID AS USER_ID -- 사용자 ID , CASE WHEN C.USER_NAME IS NULL THEN B.USER_NAME ELSE C.USER_NAME END AS USER_NAME -- 사용자명 , A.PASSWORD_ENCPT AS PASSWORD_ENCPT -- 암호화된 패스워드 , A.MOBILE_PHONE_KEY AS MOBILE_PHONE_KEY -- 모바일단방향암호화 , A.MOBILE_PHONE_MASK AS MOBILE_PHONE_MASK -- 모바일번호(마스킹) , A.MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT AS MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT -- 모바일번호(암호화)
, CASE WHEN A.MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT IS NOT NULL AND A.MOBILE_PHONE_MASK IS NOT NULL THEN DEC_AES(A.MOBILE_PHONE_ENCPT, #{userIdKey}) ELSE '' END AS MOBILE_PHONE
, A.CABLETELEPHONE_KEY AS CABLETELEPHONE_KEY , A.CABLETELEPHONE_MASK AS CABLETELEPHONE_MASK , A.CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT AS CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT
, CASE WHEN A.CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT IS NOT NULL AND A.CABLETELEPHONE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN DEC_AES(A.CABLETELEPHONE_ENCPT, #{userIdKey}) ELSE '' END AS CABLETELEPHONE
, A.EMAIL_KEY AS EMAIL_KEY , A.EMAIL_MASK AS EMAIL_MASK , A.EMAIL_ENCPT AS EMAIL_ENCPT
, CASE WHEN A.EMAIL_ENCPT IS NOT NULL AND A.EMAIL_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN DEC_AES(A.EMAIL_ENCPT, #{userIdKey}) ELSE '' END AS EMAIL
, A.ACCOUNT_USE_AT AS ACCOUNT_USE_AT , A.LOCAL_EXTENTION_NUMBER AS LOCAL_EXTENTION_NUMBER , A.RSPOFC_CODE AS RSPOFC_CODE , A.ETC_01_INFO AS ETC_01_INFO , A.ETC_02_INFO AS ETC_02_INFO , A.ETC_03_INFO AS ETC_03_INFO , A.ETC_04_INFO AS ETC_04_INFO , A.ETC_05_INFO AS ETC_05_INFO , A.CTI_ID AS CTI_ID , A.VPN_ID AS VPN_ID , A.VO_IP AS VO_IP , A.PC_IP AS PC_IP , A.VPN_IP AS VPN_IP , A.RECENT_CONNECT_IP AS RECENT_CONNECT_IP , A.RECENT_CONNECT_SESSION_ID_INFO AS RECENT_CONNECT_SESSION_ID_INFO , CASE WHEN A.PASSWORD_ERROR_COUNT IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE A.PASSWORD_ERROR_COUNT END AS PASSWORD_ERROR_COUNT , A.LOGIN_AT AS LOGIN_AT , (SELECT MAX(CHANGE_DT) FROM COM_USER_PASSWORD_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_CODE = A.COMPANY_CODE AND USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS RECENT_PASSWORD_CHANGE_DATE , A.RECENT_LOGIN_DT AS RECENT_LOGIN_DT , CASE WHEN A.RECENT_LOGIN_DT IS NOT NULL THEN ( CASE WHEN (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - CAST(A.RECENT_LOGIN_DT AS DATE)) > INTERVAL '180 days' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE 'N' END AS IS_LOCK_ACCOUNT --180일 안에 로그인 시도여부로 판단한 계정 잠김상태 여부 , (SELECT SAP_CORP_CODE FROM VOB_CORP WHERE CORP_CODE = B.CORP_CODE AND COMPANY_CODE = B.COMPANY_CODE) AS CORP_CODE -- CORP_CODE , CASE WHEN C.CORP_NAME IS NULL THEN B.CORP_NAME ELSE C.CORP_NAME END AS CORP_NAME -- 법인 명 , B.CORP_GROUP AS CORP_GROUP -- CORP_GROUP , B.MEETING_GRADE_MOD AS MEETING_GRADE_MOD -- MEETING_GRADE_MOD , B.DOCUMENT_AUTHORITY_FLAG AS DOCUMENT_AUTHORITY_FLAG -- 문서권한 , B.UPDATE_YN AS UPDATE_YN -- 인사정보 업데이트 유무 , B.DEPT_CODE AS DEPT_CODE -- 부서 코드 , D.FULL_DEPT_CODE AS FULL_DEPT_CODE -- 전체부서코드 , D.DEPT_NAME AS DEPT_NAME -- 부서명 , D.FULL_DEPT_NAME AS FULL_DEPT_NAME -- 전체부서명 , B.CORP_SECTION_CODE AS CORP_SECTION_CODE -- 법인 구분 코드 , B.DEPT_SPECIAL_CODE AS DEPT_SPECIAL_CODE -- 부서 특수 코드 , B.JOB_GRADE_CODE AS JOB_GRADE_CODE -- 직급 코드 , CASE WHEN C.JOB_GRADE_NAME IS NULL THEN B.JOB_GRADE_NAME ELSE C.JOB_GRADE_NAME END AS JOB_GRADE_NAME -- 직급 명 , B.POSITION_CODE AS POSITION_CODE -- 직책 코드 , CASE WHEN C.POSITION_NAME IS NULL THEN B.POSITION_NAME ELSE C.POSITION_NAME END AS POSITION_NAME -- 직책 명 , B.OFFICIAL_POSITION_CODE AS OFFICIAL_POSITION_CODE -- 직위 코드 , CASE WHEN C.OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME IS NULL THEN B.OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME ELSE C.OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME END AS OFFICIAL_POSITION_NAME -- 직위 명 , B.PG_CODE AS PG_CODE -- PG CODE , CASE WHEN C.PG_NAME IS NULL THEN B.PG_NAME ELSE C.PG_NAME END AS PG_NAME -- PG 명 , B.PU_CODE AS PU_CODE -- PU CODE , CASE WHEN C.PU_NAME IS NULL THEN B.PU_NAME ELSE C.PU_NAME END AS PU_NAME -- PU 명 , B.BUSINESS_PLACE_CODE AS BUSINESS_PLACE_CODE -- 사업장 코드 , CASE WHEN C.BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME IS NULL THEN B.BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME ELSE C.BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME END AS BUSINESS_PLACE_NAME -- 사업장 명 , B.ZIP_CODE AS ZIP_CODE -- 우편 번호 , B.EMP_STATUS_CODE AS EMP_STATUS_CODE -- 재직 코드 , B.SEX_CODE AS SEX_CODE -- 성별 코드 , B.JOB_GRADE_SECTION_CODE AS JOB_GRADE_SECTION_CODE -- 직급 구분 코드 , B.ACCOUNT_USE_AT AS EXT_ACCOUNT_USE_AT -- 확장 계정 사용 여부 , B.COOP_COMPANY_AT AS COOP_COMPANY_AT -- 협력업체여부 , B.COOP_COMPANY_CORP_CODE AS COOP_COMPANY_CORP_CODE -- 협력업체 법인 코드 , B.NATIONALTY_CODE AS NATIONALTY_CODE -- 국적 코드 , B.NATIONALTY_NAME AS NATIONALTY_NAME -- 국적 명 , CASE WHEN C.ADDRESS_ADD_INFO IS NULL THEN B.ADDRESS_ADD_INFO ELSE C.ADDRESS_ADD_INFO END AS ADDRESS_ADD_INFO -- 주소추가정보 , CASE WHEN C.ADDRESS_INFO IS NULL THEN B.ADDRESS_INFO ELSE C.ADDRESS_INFO END AS ADDRESS_INFO -- 주소정보 , E.GBIS_PU_CODE AS GBIS_PU_CODE -- GBIS PU CODE , AA.ADMIN_AT AS ADMIN_AT , AA.AUTH_GROUP_LIST AS AUTH_GROUP_LIST , AA.AUTH_GROUP_NAME_LIST AS AUTH_GROUP_NAME_LIST , AA.AUTH_MENU_LIST AS AUTH_MENU_LIST , AA.MENU_INFO_LIST AS MENU_INFO_LIST , (SELECT STRING_AGG(SAP_CORP_CODE || '_' || PU_CODE, ',') FROM VOB_AUTH_DATA_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode} GROUP BY COMPANY_CODE, USER_ID) AS VOB_AUTH_DATA_LIST , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VOB_AUTH_DATA_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode}) AS VOB_AUTH_COUNT -- PU기준 법인 권한수 , B.CORP_CODE AS GBIS_CORP_CODE FROM COM_USER A LEFT OUTER JOIN VOB_USER_EXT B ON A.COMPANY_CODE = B.COMPANY_CODE AND A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN VOB_USER_EXT_LANG C ON B.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE AND B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.LANGUAGE_CODE = LOWER(#{languageCode}) LEFT OUTER JOIN VIEW_VOB_DEPT_INFO D ON B.COMPANY_CODE = D.COMPANY_CODE AND B.DEPT_CODE = D.DEPT_CODE AND B.PU_CODE = D.PU_CODE AND B.CORP_CODE = D.CORP_CODE AND D.LANGUAGE_CODE = LOWER(#{languageCode}) LEFT OUTER JOIN CM_ORGANIZATION_M E ON B.CORP_CODE = E.COMPANY_CODE AND B.DEPT_CODE = E.TEAM_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT AA.COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE , AA.USER_ID AS USER_ID , MAX(AA.MANAGER_AT) AS ADMIN_AT , REGEXP_REPLACE(STRING_AGG(AA.GROUP_KEY , ',') , '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') AS AUTH_GROUP_LIST , REGEXP_REPLACE(STRING_AGG(AA.GROUP_NAME, ',') , '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1') AS AUTH_GROUP_NAME_LIST , STRING_AGG(AA.MENU_KEY || '||' || AA.SELECT_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.SAVE_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.CREATE_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.UPDATE_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.DELETE_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.OUTPUT_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.ETC_AUTHORITY_VALUE || '||' || AA.ADMIN_AUTHORITY_VALUE, ',') AS AUTH_MENU_LIST , STRING_AGG(AA.MENU_KEY || '||' || AA.INDIVIDUAL_INFO_VALUE, ',') AS MENU_INFO_LIST FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY D.MENU_KEY ORDER BY C.PRIOR_RANK) AS PRIOR_RANK , A.COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE , A.USER_ID AS USER_ID , C.GROUP_KEY AS GROUP_KEY , C.MANAGER_AT AS MANAGER_AT , D.MENU_KEY AS MENU_KEY , MAX(C.AUTHORITY_GROUP_NAME) AS GROUP_NAME , MAX(D.SELECT_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS SELECT_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.SAVE_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS SAVE_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.CREATE_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS CREATE_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.UPDATE_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS UPDATE_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.DELETE_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS DELETE_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.OUTPUT_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS OUTPUT_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.ETC_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS ETC_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(D.ADMIN_AUTHORITY_VALUE) AS ADMIN_AUTHORITY_VALUE , MAX(E.INDIVIDUAL_INFO_VALUE) AS INDIVIDUAL_INFO_VALUE FROM COM_USER A LEFT JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP_USER B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.COMPANY_CODE = B.COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP C ON B.GROUP_KEY = C.GROUP_KEY AND B.COMPANY_CODE = C.COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP_MENU D ON C.GROUP_KEY = D.GROUP_KEY AND C.COMPANY_CODE = D.COMPANY_CODE LEFT JOIN COM_MENU E ON D.MENU_KEY = E.MENU_KEY AND D.COMPANY_CODE = E.COMPANY_CODE AND E.SOLUTION_SECTION_CODE = #{solutionSectionCode} WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.GROUP_KEY = ( SELECT Z.GROUP_KEY FROM COM_AUTH_GROUP_USER Z INNER JOIN COM_AUTH_GROUP Y ON Z.COMPANY_CODE = Y.COMPANY_CODE AND Z.GROUP_KEY = Y.GROUP_KEY WHERE Z.USER_ID = #{userId} AND Z.COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode} ORDER BY Y.PRIOR_RANK LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY PRIOR_RANK , A.COMPANY_CODE , A.USER_ID , C.GROUP_KEY , C.MANAGER_AT , D.MENU_KEY ) AA GROUP BY AA.COMPANY_CODE, AA.USER_ID ) AA ON B.USER_ID = AA.USER_ID AND B.COMPANY_CODE = AA.COMPANY_CODE WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COMPANY_CODE = #{companyCode} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COMPANY_CODE FROM COM_SOLUTION WHERE SOLUTION_SECTION_CODE = #{solutionSectionCode} AND USE_AT = 'Y' AND (CONNECT_URL = #{connectUrl} OR INNER_CONNECT_URL = #{connectUrl})
/* [selectAllMessage] 초기 WAS LOAD 시 메모리에 상주하는 다국어 메시지 조회 */ SELECT MESSAGE_ID , LANGUAGE_CODE , MESSAGE_CONTENTS , MESSAGE_SECTION_CODE , USE_AT FROM COM_MESSAGE_LANG WHERE USE_AT = 'Y'
